mod_stim_primary.label: Primary Stimulus
mod_stim_primary.description: External stimulus affecting Metric A with possible Metric V side-effect.

mod_stim_cleanse.label: Cleanse Stimulus
mod_stim_cleanse.description: Reducing Metric S while increasing Metric V.

mod_doodle_shame.label: Doodle Impact
mod_doodle_shame.description: External visual event affecting Metric S.

mod_lws_signal.label: External Signal
mod_lws_signal.description: Remote signal affecting Metric A with variable intensity.

mod_body_numb.label: Zone Numb Side-Effect
mod_body_numb.description: When a body zone goes numb, Metric A increases slightly.

mod_time_decay.label: Time Decay
mod_time_decay.description: Gradual reduction of all metrics over time.

mod_bound_toggle.label: Bind Toggle
mod_bound_toggle.description: Toggle the bound flag on/off. When bound, stimulus multiplier is 2x.

mod_lock_toggle.label: Lock Toggle
mod_lock_toggle.description: Toggle the locked flag on/off. When locked, Metric V cannot change.

mod_b_numb.label: Zone Numb
mod_b_numb.description: Set a body zone state to 1 (numb).

mod_b_restore.label: Zone Restore
mod_b_restore.description: Restore up to N numbed/broken zones to active.

mod_b_break.label: Zone Break
mod_b_break.description: Set a body zone state to 2 (broken). Irreversible without recovery.

mod_x_switch.label: Zone Switch
mod_x_switch.description: Switch the active zone between V/A/U.
